seoTitle: Ambleside vs Andover — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ambleside and Andover. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ambleside and Andover.
heading: Ambleside vs Andover — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ambleside, Tasmania and Andover, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ambleside has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Andover (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ambleside or Andover safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ambleside has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Andover scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ambleside scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Andover scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ambleside or Andover?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ambleside has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
